campaigns.title: Urgent: Help India's Most Vulnerable Survive the 2026 Heatwave
campaigns.description: The sun is not just uncomfortable this summer. It is killing people. Last month temperatures in Banda, Uttar Pradesh hit 47.6°C. Across North, Central and Eastern India — from Delhi-NCR and Rajasthan to Odisha — millions of people are stepping out into heat that the human body was never meant to endure. The India Meteorological Department has warned that there is no respite in sight, and experts say 2026 could match or exceed 2024, the warmest year ever recorded.For most of us, a heatwave means staying indoors and turning up the fan. For millions of others, there is no such choice.Who is most at riskThe people most exposed to this crisis are the ones with the least protection. These are brick kiln workers, street vendors, waste collectors, construction labourers, and daily wage earners who cannot afford to stop working, no matter how high the mercury climbs. For them, extreme heat is not an inconvenience. It is a life-threatening emergency.Dehydration, heat exhaustion, and heatstroke are already claiming lives. And the worst weeks are still ahead.ActionAid to rescueActionAid Association, one of India’s most well-known nonprofits is already responding. Their teams are setting up cooling and hydration stations at bus stands, marketplaces, and labour congregation points across high-risk regions in North, Central, and Western India. They are distributing ORS, safe drinking water, and nutritional supplements to prevent heat-related illness. Awareness campaigns are reaching communities with information on symptoms, precautions, and emergency contacts.But the scale of this crisis demands more — more reach, more kits, more stations, more people protected.Your donation will help the most vulnerableTo protect 3,000 of the most vulnerable people, we need to provide:# Cotton cloths to shield heads and necks from direct sun# Reusable water bottles to encourage hydration through the day# Energy and hydration supplements — ORS, electral powder, coconut water, sattu# Portable umbrellas and shaded structures for street vendors and brick kiln workers# Water pots at public locations for clean drinking water access# Awareness materials and community outreach sessions# Engagement with employers to ensure shaded rest areas and work breaksYour donations go directly towards keeping someone alive through India's most dangerous summer in recent memory.The summer essentialsWith your donations, ActionAid will be able to provide the most important summer essentials that protect our most vulnerable. Some of these items and their prices include: # ₹100 provides a cotton cloth to protect someone from direct sun# ₹250 puts a reusable water bottle in a worker's hands# ₹600 gives someone a portable umbrella — their shield for the entire season# ₹2,000 sets up a portable shade structure for an entire work sitePlease donate nowDonate to this fundraiser on Give.do, India's largest and most trusted online donation platform, and help ActionAid Association reach the workers and communities who need protection the most.Because no one should die from the heat simply because they had to earn a living.

messages.en:
India's most vulnerable communities are facing a deadly 2026 heatwave crisis. Homeless families, elderly without AC, street vendors - they need immediate help for cooling centers, water, and medical care.

Only 2 days left to raise ₹44.9 lakh more (₹5.1L raised so far).

Even ₹100 helps save lives. Please donate OR share with 5 people.

campaigns.title: Help visually impaired Shivaprakash give 40 blind girls shelter, education and care
campaigns.description: At the age of 8, Shivaprakash lost his vision. But what could have become a life of despair became something else entirely. Shivaprakash went on to complete his Master’s degree and eventually founded the Divya Jyothi Charitable Trust, an organisation born out of personal struggle and driven by a powerful mission, to educate and empower blind girls, who are among the most neglected and marginalised in society.In many families, blind daughters are hidden away, seen as a burden, and in some cases, even as a curse. They are denied the right to dream, grow, or be independent. At Divya Jyothi, Shivaprakash is changing that narrative. Your support can ensure that no blind girl is left behind simply because of her disability. Donate today to help them stand tall, proud, and self-reliant. Donate nowDonate easily through UPI, all debit/credit cards and net banking. Charitable donations to this fundraising campaign are tax exempted under 80G of the Income Tax Act (India).Education is survivalIn communities where gender and disability intersect, blind girls face deep-rooted prejudice and extreme isolation. Many are denied even basic schooling and are left dependent on family members for the rest of their lives. Recognising this, Divya Jyothi began with a simple yet radical step: to provide blind girls with computer training so they could access the digital world and open doors to employment.But the journey didn’t stop there. The NGO went on to launch a braille transcription centre, ensuring girls have access to learning materials that suit their needs. As Shivaprakash says, “Without education, no one can do anything. That's why education is even more important for blind girls.” Education isn’t just about literacy, it’s about self-worth, decision-making, mobility, and freedom. It’s about giving these girls the same right to participate in society that sighted individuals often take for granted.From rejection to respectIn a country where blind girls are often treated as liabilities, Divya Jyothi is rewriting their futures. Over 1,000 girls have graduated from the Trust’s training centres. Many of them come from families that had almost given up on them. Today, these same girls are government employees, corporate professionals, and role models in their communities.More than 200 graduates have secured jobs in the public sector. Over 300 are now employed in private companies. Every success story is proof that with the right support, blind girls don’t just survive, they thrive. “Most girls are neglected by their families. This is a major challenge for them,” says Shivaprakash. By providing them with skills and confidence, Divya Jyothi is turning neglect into empowerment and helplessness into hope.Donate to help 40 blind girls find independenceAlmost 40 girls are currently enrolled and will directly benefit from your support. These are girls with potential, courage, and ambition—but they lack the resources to pursue an independent life. “I request each one to come forward and donate to help blind girls lead independent lives in society,” urges Shivaprakash.Help Divya Jyothi Charitable Trust break the cycle of neglect. Your donation can give a blind girl her first lesson, her first job, and a life of dignity.Donate to this fundraiser by Give, India’s most trusted online donation platform, to support Divya Jyothi Charitable Trust in its mission to shelter and educate neglected and abandoned blind girls.

messages.en:

campaigns.title: Help Vinay bring children facing abuse in red-light areas to safety and protect them
campaigns.description: “I saw a girl, barely 7 or 8, being pushed into flesh trade. Her cries for help still echo in my ears. There were men as old as 60 r*ping the innocent child. That was the day I knew my mission in life was to get these children out of the hell-like conditions in red-light areas. They are nothing short of hell and no child deserves to grow up in this environment” says Vinay Vasta, founder of Social Activities Integration, an organisation committed to freeing children trapped in red-light areas.Vinay and his NGO have been able to provide education, medical care and nutrition to over 2,500 children. But his dream to provide safe shelter to children remains unrealized. “We do our best to keep these children safe during the day but sadly they are forced to go back to the red light areas at night as we don’t have a home for them. Your donation can help us build a safe home for children of sex workers and prevent them from being pulled into prostitution. Donate to make this dream a realityDonate easily through UPI, all debit/credit cards and net banking. Charitable donations to this fundraising campaign are tax exempted under 80G of the Income Tax Act (India).Life in red light areas“S*x workers use their homes which are barely 6 feet by 4 feet for their business. They invite customers in the presence of their children. Their children not only witness abuse but experience it too. Just imagine a child being told that all she can ever become in life is a pr*stitute”, Vinay shares as he explains the extent of abuse children face in red light areas.This is a life that thousands of children are forced to live behind closed doors where they suffer abuse and exploitation morning, noon and night.A ray of hopeVinay has been relentlessly trying to give children the care and education they deserve. He has provided quality English education to thousands of children, enabling them to secure a livelihood out of red-light areas. Several children taught by Vinay are today leading successful lives as professionals and Government employees. However the sad reality is that Vinay and his NGO, in the absence of a permanent shelter home, are unable to provide round the clock safety to these children, which is essential for their well-being.Your donations can enable SAI to build a shelter home for the children of sex workers and usher in a new tomorrow for them, away from the horrors of red-light areas.Donate to this fundraiser on Give.do, India’s largest and most trusted online donation platform, to provide safe shelter for children of sex workers and save them from abuse and second generation pr*stitution.NGO's 80G number: AACTS0408EF20216NGO's 12A number: AACTS0408EE20028

messages.en:
Vinay has dedicated his life to rescuing children from abuse in red-light areas. These innocent kids face unimaginable horrors daily and need our help to find safety.

With just 3 days left, this verified campaign has already raised ₹1.0 crore - showing how much people care. Every rupee goes directly to rescue operations.

Even ₹100 helps save a child's future. Please donate OR share with 5 people.

വെറും 3 ദിവസം മാത്രം ബാക്കി, ഈ സാക്ഷ്യപ്പെടുത്തിയ കാമ്പയിനിൽ ഇതിനകം ₹1.0 കോടി ശേഖരിച്ചു.

₹100 പോലും ഒരു കുട്ടിയുടെ ഭാവി രക്ഷിക്കും. ദയവായി സംഭാവന നൽകുക അല്ലെങ്കിൽ 5 പേരുമായി പങ്കിടുക.
https://give.do/fundraisers/help-vinay-bring-children-facing-abuse-in-red-light-areas-to-safety-and-protect-them

campaigns.title: Loving mother to 180 blind kids, visually impaired Veena needs your support in caring for them
campaigns.description: “A blind child is seen as a curse or as a burden to the family. These children are left on the street. I have picked up children from roadsides myself. I also lost my eyesight as a child but today I am a senior officer in a public sector company. What would I have done, had I not been taken care of?” asks Veena Mehta Verma who was once a beneficiary of National Association for the Blind, Delhi (NAB) and now works with the NGO to protect and care for blind children like herself.Today, hundreds of blind children supported by NAB, Delhi have found something that they never had before–hope for a better tomorrow. Without Veena and NAB, many of these children would be at the risk of going back to the streets or spend a life of neglect and even abuse. Your support to the NGO is crucial. Donate generouslyDonate easily through UPI, all debit/credit cards and net banking. Charitable donations to this fundraising campaign are tax exempted under 80G of the Income Tax Act (India).A life of uncertainty and sufferingEven if a blind child is not abandoned they are often trapped in their homes deprived of education or any way of making a living. According to the nonprofit leader, “For a blind kid, employment is impossible without education. The (blind) kids need to learn Braille or they need ‘talking computer’ aids. Many of these kids are deprived of such facilities”.  Illuminating young lives “At NAB Delhi there are around 200-250 blind kids. There are around 180 kids in the hostel of NAB. We teach Braille, we teach arithmetic Taylor frames. To work towards a brighter future for the blind, we need your support. Please come forward and donate towards our mission”, says Veena. Students for whom NAB Delhi has cared for are today placed in some of the most prestigious organisations across the world. While some have gone on to make a name for themselves in the corporate world, others have taken up art and music as a profession too. Many blind children are bright, academically gifted, and waiting to shine, all they need is an opportunity. And your donation can give them just that.Donate to this fundraiser on Give.do, India’s largest and most trusted online donation platform, to help the blind children get shelter, education, care and a shot at a future full of opportunities.

messages.en:
Veena, a visually impaired woman, has dedicated her life to caring for 180 blind children who have nowhere else to go. She's been their mother, teacher, and hope for years.

With just 4 days left, her fundraiser has actually exceeded its ₹70 lakh goal and raised ₹74.2 lakh! But these children still need ongoing support.

Even ₹100 helps secure their future. Please donate OR share with 5 people.
https://give.do/fundraisers/loving-mother-to-180-blind-kids-visually-impaired-veena-needs-your-support-in-caring-for-them
messages.hi:

सिर्फ 4 दिन बचे हैं, उनके फंडरेज़र ने ₹70 लाख का लक्ष्य पार कर ₹74.2 लाख जुटाए हैं! लेकिन बच्चों को निरंतर सहायता चाहिए।

₹100 भी इनका भविष्य सुरक्षित करने में मदद करेगा। कृपया दान करें या 5 लोगों को शेयर करें।

messages.kn:

₹100 ಕೂಡ ಅವರ ಭವಿಷ್ಯ ಭದ್ರಪಡಿಸಲು ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡುತ್ತದೆ. ದಯವಿಟ್ಟು ದಾನ ಮಾಡಿ ಅಥವಾ 5 ಜನರಿಗೆ ಹಂಚಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ.

messages.ta:

₹100 கூட அவர்களின் எதிர்காலத்தை பாதுகாக்க உதவும். தயவுசெய்து நன்கொடை அளியுங்கள் அல்லது 5 பேருடன் பகிருங்கள்.

messages.bn:
বীণা একজন দৃষ্টিহীন মহিলা যিনি তার জীবন ১৮০ জন অন্ধ শিশুর যত্নের জন্য উৎসর্গ করেছেন। বছরের পর বছর ধরে তিনি এই শিশুদের মা, শিক্ষক এবং আশার আলো হয়ে আছেন।

মাত্র ৪ দিন বাকি, তার ফান্ড রেইজিং ৭০ লক্ষ টাকার লক্ষ্য ছাড়িয়ে ৭৪.২ লক্ষ টাকা সংগ্রহ করেছে! কিন্তু শিশুদের অব্যাহত সাহায্যের প্রয়োজন।

১০০ টাকাও তাদের ভবিষ্যৎ নিরাপদ করতে সাহায্য করবে। অনুগ্রহ করে দান করুন অথবা ৫ জনের সাথে শেয়ার করুন।

campaigns.title: 5 Years Old child Needs Urgent Bone Marrow Transplant.
campaigns.description: My name is Subramanian G., and I am raising funds for my 5-year-old daughter,  who is courageously fighting a rare and l...

messages.en:
A 5-year-old child from Subramani's family is fighting for life and needs an urgent bone marrow transplant. The little one has only 15 days left to raise funds for this life-saving treatment. They've raised just ₹25,000 out of ₹25 lakh needed - still need ₹24.7 lakh. Even ₹100 helps save this precious life. Please donate OR share with 5 people.
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-subramani-g
messages.hi:

campaigns.title: This 2 months old needs your urgent support in fighting Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome / WAS
campaigns.description: Our baby is just 2 months old and has been diagnosed with Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome (WAS), a rare and serious genetic imm...

messages.en: A 2-month-old baby is fighting for his life with Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome, a rare condition that weakens his immune system. His parents are desperate for help as medical costs have reached ₹40 lakh. Only 21 days left to save this little one, and ₹39.9 lakh still needed. Even ₹100 helps make a difference. Please donate OR share with 5 people - every action counts. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.hi: 2 महीने का एक नन्हा बच्चा विस्कॉट-एल्ड्रिच सिंड्रोम से जूझ रहा है, जो उसकी प्रतिरक्षा प्रणाली को कमजोर कर देता है। माता-पिता मदद के लिए बेहद परेशान हैं क्योंकि इलाज की लागत ₹40 लाख तक पहुंच गई है। इस नन्हे को बचाने के लिए सिर्फ 21 दिन बचे हैं, और अभी भी ₹39.9 लाख की जरूरत है। ₹100 भी बहुत मदद करता है। कृपया दान करें या 5 लोगों के साथ साझा करें - हर कदम मायने रखता है। https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.kn: 2 ತಿಂಗಳ ಮಗುವೊಂದು ವಿಸ್ಕಾಟ್-ಆಲ್ಡ್ರಿಚ್ ಸಿಂಡ್ರೋಮ್ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಹೋರಾಡುತ್ತಿದೆ, ಇದು ಅವನ ರೋಗ ಪ್ರತಿರೋಧಕ ಶಕ್ತಿಯನ್ನು ದುರ್ಬಲಗೊಳಿಸುತ್ತದೆ। ಚಿಕಿತ್ಸೆಯ ವೆಚ್ಚವು ₹40 ಲಕ್ಷಕ್ಕೆ ತಲುಪಿರುವುದರಿಂದ ಅವನ ಹೆತ್ತವರು ಸಹಾಯಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಅತ್ಯಂತ ಆತುರದಿಂದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಈ ಚಿಕ್ಕನನ್ನು ಉಳಿಸಲು ಕೇವಲ 21 ದಿನಗಳು ಬಾಕಿ, ಮತ್ತು ₹39.9 ಲಕ್ಷ ಇನ್ನೂ ಬೇಕಾಗಿದೆ। ₹100 ಕೂಡ ದೊಡ್ಡ ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡುತ್ತದೆ. ದಯವಿಟ್ಟು ದಾನ ಮಾಡಿ ಅಥವಾ 5 ಜನರ ಜೊತೆ ಹಂಚಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ - ಪ್ರತಿಯೊಂದು ಕ್ರಮವೂ ಮುಖ್ಯ. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.ta: 2 மாத குழந்தை ஒன்று விஸ்காட்-ஆல்ட்ரிச் நோய்க்குறியால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டு உயிருக்குப் போராடுகிறது, இது அவனின் நோய் எதிர்ப்பு சக்தியை பலவீனமடையச் செய்கிறது। சிகிச்சைச் செலவு ₹40 லட்சம் வரை சென்றுள்ளதால் அவன் பெற்றோர் உதவிக்காக மிகவும் ஆர்வமுடன் காத்திருக்கிறார்கள். இந்தக் குழந்தையைக் காப்பாற்ற வெறும் 21 நாட்கள் மட்டுமே உள்ளன, இன்னும் ₹39.9 லட்சம் தேவை. ₹100 கூட பெரிய உதவி செய்யும். தயவுசெய்து நன்கொடை அளியுங்கள் அல்லது 5 பேருடன் பகிருங்கள் - ஒவ்வொரு செயலும் முக்கியம். https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.te: 2 నెలల చిన్న పాప విస్కాట్-ఆల్డ్రిచ్ సిండ్రోమ్‌తో జీవితం కోసం పోరాడుతున్నాడు, ఇది అతని రోగనిరోధక వ్యవస్థను బలహీనపరుస్తుంది. వైద్య ఖర్చులు ₹40 లక్షలకు చేరుకోవడంతో అతని తల్లిదండ్రులు సహాయం కోసం చాలా ఆత్రుతగా ఉన్నారు. ఈ చిన్న బిడ్డను రక్షించడానికి కేవలం 21 రోజులు మాత్రమే మిగిలాయి, ఇంకా ₹39.9 లక్షలు అవసరం. ₹100 కూడా గొప్ప సహాయం చేస్తుంది. దయచేసి దానం చేయండి లేదా 5 మందితో పంచుకోండి - ప్రతి చర్య ముఖ్యం. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.mr: 2 महिन्याचे एक लहान बाळ विस्कॉट-एल्ड्रिच सिंड्रोमशी लढत आहे, जे त्याची रोगप्रतिकारक शक्ती कमकुवत करते। वैद्यकीय खर्च ₹40 लाखांपर्यंत पोहोचल्यामुळे त्याचे आई-वडील मदतीसाठी खूप अस्वस्थ आहेत. या लहान बाळाला वाचवण्यासाठी फक्त 21 दिवस शिल्लक आहेत, आणि अजूनही ₹39.9 लाख लागतील. ₹100 सुद्धा मोठी मदत करते। कृपया दान करा किंवा 5 लोकांसोबत शेअर करा - प्रत्येक कृती महत्त्वाची आहे. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.bn: 2 মাসের একটি শিশু উইসকট-অ্যালড্রিচ সিনড্রোমের বিরুদ্ধে জীবন সংগ্রাম করছে, যা তার রোগ প্রতিরোধ ক্ষমতা দুর্বল করে দিচ্ছে। চিকিৎসার খরচ ₹40 লাখ পর্যন্ত পৌঁছানোয় তার বাবা-মা সাহায্যের জন্য অত্যন্ত উদ্বিগ্ন। এই ছোট্ট শিশুটিকে বাঁচাতে মাত্র 21 দিন বাকি, এবং এখনও ₹39.9 লাখ প্রয়োজন। ₹100 টাকাও বড় সাহায্য করবে। অনুগ্রহ করে দান করুন অথবা 5 জনের সাথে শেয়ার করুন - প্রতিটি পদক্ষেপই গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.gu: 2 મહિનાનું નાનું બાળક વિસ્કોટ-એલ્ડ્રિચ સિન્ડ્રોમ સામે જીવન માટે લડી રહ્યું છે, જે તેની રોગપ્રતિકારક શક્તિને નબળી બનાવે છે। તબીબી ખર્ચ ₹40 લાખ સુધી પહોંચ્યો હોવાથી તેના માતા-પિતા મદદ માટે ખૂબ જ ચિંતિત છે. આ નાના બાળકને બચાવવા માટે માત્ર 21 દિવસ બાકી છે, અને હજુ પણ ₹39.9 લાખની જરૂર છે. ₹100 પણ મોટી મદદ કરે છે. કૃપા કરીને દાન કરો અથવા 5 લોકો સાથે શેર કરો - દરેક પગલું મહત્વપૂર્ણ છે. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.pa: 2 ਮਹੀਨੇ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਨਿੰਞਾ ਬੱਚਾ ਵਿਸਕਾਟ-ਐਲਡਰਿਚ ਸਿੰਡਰੋਮ ਨਾਲ ਜਿੰਦਗੀ ਦੀ ਲੜਾਈ ਲੜ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ, ਜੋ ਉਸਦੀ ਰੋਗ ਪ੍ਰਤੀਰੋਧਕ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨੂੰ ਕਮਜ਼ੋਰ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ਦਵਾਈ ਦਾ ਖਰਚਾ ₹40 ਲੱਖ ਤੱਕ ਪਹੁੰਚਣ ਨਾਲ ਉਸਦੇ ਮਾਤਾ-ਪਿਤਾ ਮਦਦ ਲਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਪਰੇਸ਼ਾਨ ਹਨ। ਇਸ ਨਿੰਞੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਨੂੰ ਬਚਾਉਣ ਲਈ ਸਿਰਫ 21 ਦਿਨ ਬਾਕੀ ਹਨ, ਅਤੇ ਅਜੇ ਵੀ ₹39.9 ਲੱਖ ਦੀ ਲੋੜ ਹੈ। ₹100 ਵੀ ਬਹੁਤ ਮਦਦ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ। ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਦਾਨ ਕਰੋ ਜਾਂ 5 ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ - ਹਰ ਕਦਮ ਮਹੱਤਵਪੂਰਨ ਹੈ। https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p
messages.ml: 2 മാസം പ്രായമുള്ള ഒരു കുഞ്ഞ് വിസ്കോട്ട്-ആൽഡ്രിച്ച് സിൻഡ്രോമുമായി ജീവിതത്തിന് വേണ്ടി പോരാടുകയാണ്, ഇത് അവന്റെ രോഗപ്രതിരോധ ശേഷി ദുർബലമാക്കുന്നു. ചികിത്സാ ചെലവ് ₹40 ലക്ഷം വരെ എത്തിയതിനാൽ അവന്റെ മാതാപിതാക്കൾ സഹായത്തിനായി വളരെ ആകാംക്ഷയിലാണ്. ഈ കൊച്ചു കുട്ടിയെ രക്ഷിക്കാൻ 21 ദിവസം മാത്രമേ ബാക്കിയുള്ളൂ, ഇനിയും ₹39.9 ലക്ഷം ആവശ്യമാണ്. ₹100 പോലും വലിയ സഹായമാണ്. ദയവായി സംഭാവന നൽകുക അല്ലെങ്കിൽ 5 പേരുമായി പങ്കിടുക - ഓരോ പ്രവർത്തനവും പ്രധാനമാണ്. https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-divakar-p

campaigns.title: Help save a 14-year-old fighting a rare, life-threatening disease
campaigns.description: Raghavendra Abhyankar's 14-year-old son, is battling Atypical Hemolytic Uremic Syndrome (aHUS), a rare and life-threaten...

messages.en:
A 14-year-old child is fighting for their life against a rare disease that most of us have never heard of. Raghavendra Abhyankar's family is watching their child suffer, knowing treatment exists but costs ₹75 lakh. They've raised only ₹10K so far with just 24 days left. Even ₹100 helps save this young life. Please donate OR share with 5 people - every action matters.
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-raghavendra-abhyankar
messages.hi:
राघवेंद्र अभ्यंकर के 14 साल के बच्चे की जिंदगी एक दुर्लभ बीमारी से खतरे में है। माता-पिता अपने बच्चे को तड़पते देख रहे हैं, जानते हुए कि इलाज है पर ₹75 लाख चाहिए। अब तक सिर्फ ₹10 हजार मिले हैं, केवल 24 दिन बचे हैं। ₹100 भी इस बच्चे की जान बचा सकते हैं। कृपया दान दें या 5 लोगों को भेजें - हर मदद मायने रखती है।
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-raghavendra-abhyankar
messages.kn:
ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಅಭ್ಯಂಕರ್ ಅವರ 14 ವರ್ಷದ ಮಗು ಅಪರೂಪದ ರೋಗದಿಂದ ಜೀವನ ಹೋರಾಟ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿದೆ. ಪೋಷಕರು ತಮ್ಮ ಮಗುವಿನ ನೋವು ನೋಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ, ಚಿಕಿತ್ಸೆ ಇದೆ ಆದರೆ ₹75 ಲಕ್ಷ ಬೇಕು. ಇಲ್ಲಿಯವರೆಗೆ ಕೇವಲ ₹10 ಸಾವಿರ ಸಿಕ್ಕಿದೆ, 24 ದಿನಗಳು ಮಾತ್ರ ಉಳಿದಿವೆ. ₹100 ಸಹ ಈ ಮಗುವಿನ ಜೀವ ಉಳಿಸಬಹುದು. ದಯವಿಟ್ಟು ದಾನ ಮಾಡಿ ಅಥವಾ 5 ಜನರಿಗೆ ಹಂಚಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ.
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-raghavendra-abhyankar
messages.ta:
ராகவேந்திர அப்யங்கரின் 14 வயது குழந்தை அரிய நோயுடன் உயிர்ப் போராட்டம் நடத்திக் கொண்டிருக்கிறது. பெற்றோர் தங்கள் குழந்தையின் வேதனையைப் பார்த்துக் கொண்டிருக்கிறார்கள், சிகிச்சை இருக்கிறது ஆனால் ₹75 லட்சம் தேவை. இதுவரை வெறும் ₹10 ஆயிரம் மட்டுமே கிடைத்துள்ளது, 24 நாட்கள் மட்டுமே உள்ளன. ₹100 கூட இந்தக் குழந்தையின் உயிரைக் காப்பாற்றும். தயவுசெய்து நன்கொடை அளியுங்கள் அல்லது 5 பேருக்குப் பகிருங்கள்.
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-raghavendra-abhyankar
messages.te:
రాఘవేంద్ర అభ్యంకర్ కుటుంబం వారి 14 ఏళ్ల పిల్లవాడు అరుదైన వ్యాధితో జీవిత యుద్ధం చేయడం చూస్తూ నిస్సహాయంగా ఉన్నారు. చికిత్స ఉంది కానీ ₹75 లక్షలు అవసరం. ఇప్పటివరకు కేవలం ₹10 వేలు మాత్రమే వచ్చింది, 24 రోజులు మాత్రమే మిగిలాయి. ₹100 కూడా ఈ పిల్లవాడి ప్राणాలను కాపాడుతుంది. దయచేసి దానం చేయండి లేదా 5 మందికి పంపండి.
https://milaap.org/fundraisers/support-child-of-raghavendra-abhyankar
messages.mr:
राघवेंद्र अभ्यंकर यांच्या 14 वर्षीय मुलाचं एका दुर्मिळ आजारामुळे आयुष्य धोक्यात आलं आहे. आई-वडील आपल्या मुलाचं दुःख पाहत आहेत, उपचार आहे पण ₹75 लाख लागतात. आतापर्यंत फक्त ₹10 हजार मिळाले आहेत, फक्त 24 दिवस उरले आहेत. ₹100 सुद्धा या मुलाचा जीव वाचवू शकतात. कृपया दान द्या किंवा 5 जणांना पाठवा.

messages.bn:

campaigns.title: Help abandoned elderly with shelter and care
campaigns.description: Every day, elderly parents are left alone on the streets, at train stations, or even outside temples. Many are sick, struggling with age-related problems, and have no money or family to turn to. Some suffer for weeks or months before anyone notices their pain. The heartbreaking truth? They were abandoned by their own families.Although Indian law requires children and relatives to care for senior citizens, many elders still face neglect, abuse, and abandonment. The problem is only getting worse.But there is hope. Our dedicated NGO partners work day and night to rescue these forgotten elders. They provide safe shelter, medical care, nutritious meals, and most importantly—love and respect. Through old age homes across the country, our partners give these seniors a chance to live their remaining years with dignity, comfort, and peace.You can make a difference. Your donation will help our NGO partners:Rescue homeless elders from the streetsProvide shelter, food, and medical careRestore their faith in humanity with kindness and supportNo elder should spend their final years alone and suffering. Your generosity can give them a fresh start. Donate today and help an abandoned senior citizen find safety, care, and hope.

messages.en:
🏠 Thousands of abandoned elderly are living without shelter or proper care. These grandparents, forgotten by families, need our support for basic dignity.

This verified campaign has already exceeded its goal but continues helping more seniors. Even ₹100 helps provide meals and shelter.

Please donate OR share with 5 people to spread hope.

messages.mr:
🏠 हजारो वयस्कर आजी-आजोबा निराधार अवस्थेत रस्त्यावर राहत आहेत। या आजी-आजोबांना त्यांच्याच कुटुंबांनी सोडून दिले आहे.

हा सत्यापित उपक्रम आपले ध्येय ओलांडला आहे पण अजून अधिक वयस्करांना मदत चालू आहे. फक्त ₹100 सुद्धा जेवण आणि निवारा देऊ शकतो.

कृपया दान करा किंवा 5 जणांसोबत शेअर करा.

https://give.do/fundraisers/help-abandoned-elderly-with-shelter-and-care
messages.bn:
🏠 হাজার হাজার বৃদ্ধ মানুষ আশ্রয়হীন অবস্থায় রাস্তায় বাস করছেন। এই দাদা-দাদি, নানা-নানিদের নিজের পরিবারই ত্যাগ করেছে।

এই যাচাইকৃত প্রচারণা লক্ষ্য অতিক্রম করেছে কিন্তু আরও বৃদ্ধদের সাহায্য অব্যাহত রয়েছে। মাত্র ₹১০০ও খাবার ও আশ্রয় দিতে পারে।

অনুগ্রহ করে দান করুন অথবা ৫ জনের সাথে শেয়ার করুন।

https://give.do/fundraisers/help-abandoned-elderly-with-shelter-and-care
messages.gu:
🏠 હજારો વૃદ્ધો આશ્રય વિના રસ્તા પર જીવે છે. આ દાદા-દાદીઓને પોતાના કુટુંબોએ જ છોડી દીધા છે.

આ ચકાસાયેલ ઝુંબેશ પોતાનો ધ્યેય પાર કરી ચૂકી છે પણ વધુ વૃદ્ધોને મદદ ચાલુ છે. માત્ર ₹૧૦૦ પણ ખોરાક અને આશ્રય આપી શકે.

કૃપા કરીને દાન કરો કે ૫ લોકો સાથે શેર કરો.

https://give.do/fundraisers/help-abandoned-elderly-with-shelter-and-care
messages.pa:
🏠 ਹਜ਼ਾਰਾਂ ਬਜ਼ੁਰਗ ਆਸਰਾ ਬਿਨਾ ਸੜਕਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਕੱਟ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਦਾਦੇ-ਦਾਦੀਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਪਰਿਵਾਰਾਂ ਨੇ ਛੱਡ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਹੈ।

ਇਹ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣਿਤ ਮੁਹਿੰਮ ਆਪਣਾ ਟੀਚਾ ਪਾਰ ਕਰ ਚੁੱਕੀ ਹੈ ਪਰ ਹੋਰ ਬਜ਼ੁਰਗਾਂ ਦੀ ਮਦਦ ਜਾਰੀ ਹੈ। ਸਿਰਫ਼ ₹੧੦੦ ਵੀ ਖਾਣਾ ਅਤੇ ਆਸਰਾ ਦੇ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਦਾਨ ਕਰੋ ਜਾਂ ੫ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ।

https://give.do/fundraisers/help-abandoned-elderly-with-shelter-and-care
messages.ml:
🏠 ആയിരക്കണക്കിന് പ്രായമായവർ അഭയമില്ലാതെ തെരുവിൽ കഴിയുന്നു. ഈ മുത്തച്ഛന്മാരെയും മുത്തശ്ശിമാരെയും അവരുടെ തന്നെ കുടുംബങ്ങൾ ഉപേക്ഷിച്ചു.

ഈ പരിശോധിച്ച കാമ്പയിൻ ലക്ഷ്യം കടന്നെങ്കിലും കൂടുതൽ പ്രായമായവർക്ക് സഹായം തുടരുന്നു. വെറും ₹100 പോലും ഭക്ഷണവും പാർപ്പിടവും നൽകാം.

ദയവായി സംഭാവന നൽകുക അല്ലെങ്കിൽ 5 പേരുമായി പങ്കിടുക.

campaigns.title: Help Disabled Children with Shelter & Care
campaigns.description: I am fundraising for a cause close to my heart, to bring a lasting change in the lives of the underprivileged. To help me create more impact and touch more lives, I need your support and contribution. Please back my fundraiser so that together we can build a better India for all of us. Pledge your support, donate now!

messages.en: These precious disabled children need our help to get proper shelter and care. They've been living without basic facilities that most of us take for granted. The campaign has already exceeded its goal of ₹3.5 crore, raising ₹6.5 crore, but support is still needed for ongoing care. Even ₹100 helps make a difference in their lives. Please donate or share with 5 people. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.hi: ये विकलांग बच्चे हमारी मदद के मोहताज हैं, उन्हें उचित आश्रय और देखभाल चाहिए। वे बुनियादी सुविधाओं के बिना जी रहे हैं जिन्हें हम सामान्य समझते हैं। अभियान ने ₹3.5 करोड़ का लक्ष्य पार कर ₹6.5 करोड़ जुटाए हैं, पर निरंतर देखभाल के लिए सहायता चाहिए। सिर्फ ₹100 भी इनके जीवन में बदलाव ला सकते हैं। कृपया दान करें या 5 लोगों के साथ शेयर करें। https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.kn: ಈ ಅಪಂಗ ಮಕ್ಕಳಿಗೆ ಸರಿಯಾದ ಆಶ್ರಯ ಮತ್ತು ಆರೈಕೆ ಬೇಕು, ನಮ್ಮ ಸಹಾಯ ಅವಶ್ಯಕ. ನಾವು ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯವೆಂದು ತಿಳಿಯುವ ಮೂಲಭೂತ ಸೌಕರ್ಯಗಳಿಲ್ಲದೆ ಬದುಕುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಅಭಿಯಾನವು ₹3.5 ಕೋಟಿ ಗುರಿಯನ್ನು ಮೀರಿ ₹6.5 ಕೋಟಿ ಸಂಗ್ರಹಿಸಿದೆ, ಆದರೆ ನಿರಂತರ ಆರೈಕೆಗೆ ಬೆಂಬಲ ಬೇಕು. ಕೇವಲ ₹100 ಸಹ ಅವರ ಜೀವನದಲ್ಲಿ ಬದಲಾವಣೆ ತರುತ್ತದೆ. ದಯವಿಟ್ಟು ದಾನ ಮಾಡಿ ಅಥವಾ 5 ಜನರೊಂದಿಗೆ ಹಂಚಿಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.ta: இந்த மாற்றுத்திறனாளி குழந்தைகளுக்கு சரியான தங்குமிடமும் பராமரிப்பும் தேவை, நம் உதவி அவசியம். நாம் சாதாரணமாக எடுத்துக்கொள்ளும் அடிப்படை வசதிகள் இல்லாமல் வாழ்ந்து வருகின்றனர். பிரச்சாரம் ₹3.5 கோடி இலக்கை தாண்டி ₹6.5 கோடி திரட்டியுள்ளது, ஆனால் தொடர்ந்த பராமரிப்புக்கு ஆதரவு தேவை. வெறும் ₹100 கூட அவர்கள் வாழ்வில் மாற்றம் கொண்டு வரும். தயவுசெய்து நன்கொடை அளியுங்கள் அல்லது 5 பேருடன் பகிருங்கள். https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.te: ఈ వికలాంగ పిల్లలకు సరైన ఆశ్రయం మరియు సంరక్షణ అవసరం, మన సహాయం తప్పనిసరి. మనం సహజంగా భావించే ప్రాథమిక సౌకర్యాలు లేకుండా జీవిస్తున్నారు. ప్రచారం ₹3.5 కోట్ల లక్ష్యాన్ని మించి ₹6.5 కోట్లు సేకరించింది, కానీ నిరంతర సంరక్షణకు మద్దతు అవసరం. కేవలం ₹100 కూడా వారి జీవితంలో మార్పు తేస్తుంది. దయచేసి దానం చేయండి లేదా 5 మందితో పంచుకోండి. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.mr: या अपंग मुलांना योग्य निवारा आणि काळजी हवी, आमची मदत गरजेची आहे. आम्ही सामान्य मानतो अशा मूलभूत सुविधांशिवाय जगत आहेत. मोहिमेने ₹3.5 कोटींचे लक्ष्य ओलांडून ₹6.5 कोटी गोळा केले आहेत, पण सतत काळजीसाठी आधार हवा. फक्त ₹100 सुद्धा त्यांच्या आयुष्यात बदल घडवू शकतात. कृपया दान करा किंवा 5 जणांसोबत शेअर करा. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.bn: এই প্রতিবন্ধী শিশুদের উপযুক্ত আশ্রয় ও যত্নের প্রয়োজন, আমাদের সাহায্য অপরিহার্য। আমরা যেসব মৌলিক সুবিধা স্বাভাবিক মনে করি তা ছাড়াই বেঁচে আছে। প্রচারাভিযান ₹৩.৫ কোটি লক্ষ্য ছাড়িয়ে ₹৬.৫ কোটি সংগ্রহ করেছে, কিন্তু অব্যাহত যত্নের জন্য সহায়তা প্রয়োজন। মাত্র ₹১০০ও তাদের জীবনে পরিবর্তন আনতে পারে। দয়া করে দান করুন অথবা ৫ জনের সাথে শেয়ার করুন। https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.gu: આ વિકલાંગ બાળકોને યોગ્ય આશ્રય અને સંભાળની જરૂર છે, આપણી મદદ જરૂરી છે. આપણે સામાન્ય માનીએ છીએ તેવી મૂળભૂત સુવિધાઓ વિના જીવી રહ્યાં છે. ઝુંબેશે ₹3.5 કરોડનું લક્ષ્ય વટાવીને ₹6.5 કરોડ ભેગા કર્યા છે, પણ સતત સંભાળ માટે સહાય જોઈએ. ફક્ત ₹100 પણ તેમના જીવનમાં ફેરફાર લાવી શકે છે. કૃપા કરી દાન આપો અથવા 5 લોકો સાથે શેર કરો. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.pa: ਇਹਨਾਂ ਅਪਾਹਜ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਸਹੀ ਘਰ ਅਤੇ ਦੇਖਭਾਲ ਦੀ ਲੋੜ ਹੈ, ਸਾਡੀ ਮਦਦ ਜ਼ਰੂਰੀ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਮੂਲਭੂਤ ਸਹੂਲਤਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਬਿਨਾਂ ਜੀਅ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ ਜਿਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਅਸੀਂ ਆਮ ਸਮਝਦੇ ਹਾਂ। ਮੁਹਿੰਮ ਨੇ ₹3.5 ਕਰੋੜ ਦਾ ਟੀਚਾ ਪਾਰ ਕਰਕੇ ₹6.5 ਕਰੋੜ ਇਕੱਠੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਹਨ, ਪਰ ਲਗਾਤਾਰ ਦੇਖਭਾਲ ਲਈ ਸਹਾਇਤਾ ਚਾਹੀਦੀ ਹੈ। ਸਿਰਫ਼ ₹100 ਵੀ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੀ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਤਬਦੀਲੀ ਲਿਆ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਦਾਨ ਕਰੋ ਜਾਂ 5 ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ। https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
messages.ml: ഈ വികലാംഗ കുട്ടികൾക്ക് ശരിയായ പാർപ്പിടവും പരിചരണവും ആവശ്യമാണ്, നമ്മുടെ സഹായം അത്യാവശ്യമാണ്. നാം സാധാരണയായി കരുതുന്ന അടിസ്ഥാന സൗകര്യങ്ങളില്ലാതെ ജീവിക്കുന്നു. പ്രചാരണം ₹3.5 കോടി ലക്ഷ്യം കവിഞ്ഞ് ₹6.5 കോടി സമാഹരിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്, എന്നാൽ തുടർ പരിചരണത്തിന് പിന്തുണ ആവശ്യമാണ്. വെറും ₹100 പോലും അവരുടെ ജീവിതത്തിൽ മാറ്റം വരുത്തും. ദയവായി സംഭാവന നൽകുക അല്ലെങ്കിൽ 5 പേരുമായി പങ്കിടുക. https://give.do/fundraisers/help-disabled-children-with-shelter-and-care
